data.name: 秘湯女孩
data.detailed_description:
Seeking relaxation from a long, hard week at work, one diligent salaryman finds much more than mere repose: A secret shop run by the goddess of hot springs!

Offered her blessings in exchange for faith, his task becomes to enjoy as many hot springs as possible. The goddess’ first blessing reveals a secluded place hidden deep in the mountains, where he is fated to meet Sayaka – a beautiful woman sharing his love for hot springs… and for all the naughty things a couple can do together in the bath’s steamy heat.

This is your story, of love, leisure and sex to gather faith for the goddess of hot springs!








Gather faith for the goddess of hot springs by enjoying the bathing facilities together with Sayaka. Faith can be earned in multiple ways: Soak in one of the hot springs, indulge in naughty acts or collect hidden Hot Spring Coins. Once you have accumulated enough faith for the goddess, you can receive one of her blessings to unlock new locations, increase your weekly travel budget and more!

There is no time limit, you can play the game at your own pace.





  • A wholesome, lovey-dovey experience.
  • A variety of hot springs to visit together with Sayaka. Each location has its own story event and unlocks new sex positions.
  • Story events can be viewed again at any time via the protagonist’s laptop.
  • The protagonist can be toggled on and off or made transparent during sex scenes.
  • Lots of naughty events and positions to enjoy, both in and outside of the hot springs.
  • Free Mode to revisit a location whenever you want. In Free Mode, you can select any unlocked position and control the speed of the action yourself.
  • Fully one-handed control throughout the entire game.
  • A hidden secret to unlock for gathering all 100 Hot Spring Coins!

data.short_description: Relax and release all stress in this isometric pixel-art game, blessed by the goddess of hot springs. Bathe together with the beautiful Sayaka, travel to various locations and enjoy a wholesome time with the Secret Hot Springs Girl.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 日文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 450 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10
  • 處理器: 2+ GHz Processor
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support required for WebGL acceleration. (AMD Catalyst 10.9, nVidia 358.50)
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 450 MB 可用空間
